infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RecipeApp uses your camera to identify ingredients and automatically add them to your pantry.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RecipeApp accesses your photos so you can select ingredient images for recognition.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: RecipeApp uses your microphone so you can ask the AI cooking assistant questions hands-free.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: RecipeApp uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice questions for the AI cooking assistant.

plugins.cameraPermission: RecipeApp uses your camera to identify ingredients and automatically add them to your pantry.

plugins.photosPermission: RecipeApp accesses your photos so you can select ingredient images for recognition.

plugins.microphonePermission: RecipeApp uses your microphone so you can ask the AI cooking assistant questions hands-free.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: RecipeApp uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice questions for the AI cooking assistant.
